Defiance Launches the First Autism-Impact ETF (Ticker: ASD), Donating Profits to Autism Causes *

holdings.infoBox: ASD is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Definium Therapeutics stock at 4.38%, LifeStance Health Group at 3.13%, Otsuka Holdings at 3.12%, Acadia Healthcare Company at 3.06%, and Neuren Pharmaceuticals at 3.03%.

overview.description: The Defiance Autism Impact ETF (ASD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Autism Impact index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of companies from developed markets supporting individuals on the autism spectrum and broader community. The fund donates profits to organizations focused on autism care, research, and access to resources. ASD was launched on Jun 1, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
